name: E-Commerce Website
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform for Bangladesh market. Features include flash sales, coupon system, COD checkout with BD division/district selector, guest cart, and admin dashboard with Recharts analytics.
challenges: Implementing drag-and-drop features and ensuring responsive design across templates.

name: Smart Job Placement Portal
description: Team-lead project — a full-stack job portal platform with role-based access for employers and job seekers. Features include job postings, applications, and real-time status tracking.
challenges: Implementing drag-and-drop features and ensuring responsive design across templates.
futurePlans: Adding analytics for resume performance, expanding AI suggestions, and integrating export options in DOCX format.

name: Blogging Website
description: Developer blogging platform with a polished dark-mode editor built using ReactQuill and Tailwind CSS. Features Cloudinary image uploads, Catppuccin-inspired palette, and smooth animations.
challenges: Implementing drag-and-drop features and ensuring responsive design across templates.
futurePlans: Adding analytics for resume performance, expanding AI suggestions, and integrating export options in DOCX format.
